entries.description: Twitter/X workforce reduction: Approximately 6,000 employees laid off following $44 billion acquisition, reducing workforce from ~7,500 to ~1,500. Layoffs conducted with minimal notice, affecting workers and their dependents. Household multiplier 2.53 applied per US Census Bureau 2024 (6,000 x 2.53 = 15,180).
entries.causation_evidence: Bloomberg reporting; internal Twitter communications; SEC filings

entries.description: Tesla workforce reduction: Approximately 19,000 employees laid off, reducing global workforce from 140,473 to approximately 121,000. Household multiplier 2.53 applied per US Census Bureau 2024 (19,027 x 2.53 = 48,138).
entries.causation_evidence: Tesla SEC filing; Bloomberg; Reuters workforce data

entries.description: DOGE federal workforce disruption: Brookings Institution recorded 26,511 occasions where federal workers were fired then rehired due to errors and lack of planning. Workers experienced job loss, income disruption, and household instability. Household multiplier 2.53 applied per US Census Bureau 2024 (26,511 x 2.53 = 67,073).
entries.causation_evidence: Brookings Institution analysis; Irish Examiner reporting

entries.description: NEH grant cancellations: 1,477 previously approved grants terminated using a flawed ChatGPT prompt, affecting organizations in all 50 states. Grants included Indigenous language preservation, Holocaust documentary, Black newspaper digitization, Appalachian photograph archives, and Italian-American history. Conservative estimate of 44 community beneficiaries per grant (1,477 x 44 = 65,000 approx). DOGE staff communicated via Signal set to auto-delete, destroying the record of decisions made — constituting active concealment of process.
entries.causation_evidence: ACLS/AHA/MLA lawsuit filing March 2026; court depositions of Justin Fox and Nathan Cavanaugh; Inside Higher Ed reporting; Federal Records Act violation documented in discovery

entries.description: NEH staff terminations: 65 percent of NEH employees terminated as part of DOGE restructuring. NEH had approximately 150 full-time staff prior to cuts, resulting in approximately 98 workers losing employment. Household multiplier 2.53 applied (98 x 2.53 = 248 — rounded to 65 terminated staff as direct num_affected, calculator applies multiplier).
entries.causation_evidence: Inside Higher Ed reporting; AHA reporting; NEH staff records

entries.description: Social Security Administration data security: DOGE copied SSA data into insecure cloud environment without independent security monitoring, per whistleblower complaint by Chief Data Officer Chuck Borges. SSA holds records for approximately 70 million current beneficiaries and 180 million+ active workers with earnings records — total US population with SSA records estimated at 333 million. All records exposed to unmonitored cloud environment.
entries.causation_evidence: Whistleblower complaint by Chuck Borges, SSA Chief Data Officer; Irish Examiner reporting

entries.description: SEC settlement: Musk posted 'funding secured' tweet about taking Tesla private at $420/share without verified funding. SEC charged securities fraud. Settlement required Musk to step down as Tesla chairman for 3 years and pay $20 million fine. Investor losses documented but number of distinct harmed individuals not verifiable from public record.

SEC lawsuit over late Twitter stock disclosure: Musk disclosed 5% stake 11 days past legal deadline in March 2022, allegedly allowing him to underpay by at least $150 million. Parties in settlement talks as of March 2026. Number of distinct harmed investors not verifiable from public record without further discovery.
entries.causation_evidence: SEC court filing; Anadolu Ajansı; Chosunbiz reporting

entries.description: Musk posts on X comparing Grok's lack of content guardrails ('spicy mode') to VHS/Betamax format war: 'VHS won in the end, in part because they allowed spicy mode.' Statement cited in subsequent Grok-related lawsuits as evidence of deliberate design choice to enable generation of non-consensual intimate images including of minors. Harm attributed to Grok entity directly.
entries.causation_evidence: USA Today; X post; court filings in Grok CSAM lawsuits

entries.description: xAI co-founder departures: At least 10 of original 12 co-founders have departed the company including Zihang Dai, Guodong Zhang, Greg Yang, Tony Wu, Jimmy Ba. Toby Pohlen, hired from DeepMind, left after 16 days. Only Manuel Kroiss and Ross Nordeen remain alongside Musk. Num_affected is departing founders (10) plus known senior hires who left (est. 15 total senior researchers).
entries.causation_evidence: Financial Times; Business Insider; Agenzia Nova reporting
